body.title: Lateral inhibition in BG habit scoring
body.result: Added active_goal_keywords param to select_habit in basal_ganglia.py. When active GOAL in TWM: goal-relevant habits get +0.20 boost, unrelated action habits get -0.15 dampen. main.py reads TWM category=goal before BG call and extracts goal source_message keywords. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Add lateral inhibition to BG dispatch: similar/competing habits suppress each other, sharpening the winner. Currently two habits scoring 0.60 and 0.65 both activate — should produce one clean winner. Implement winner-take-all dynamics within semantic clusters. Goal nodes must win cleanly over action nodes when active (D274 fix mechanism). Medium inertia: cognition/basal_ganglia.py.
